examples: Glioma is the most common neoplasm in brain, which is commonly considered as the tumor tissues with high radioresistance.
Comparatively, as IRM-2 mice are of radioresistance, the role of DNA damage caused by radiation and damage repair can be observed directly invivo.
This paper presents a hardware structure-independent weight-based fault injection model for accurate emulation of the radioresistance in the SRAM-based FPGA.
